title: Sauce Delight
description: A Farmer's Delight addon that adds delicious sauces and condiments.
body:
## ⚙️ Mod Compatibility

### Create

All sauces have fluid versions that work with Create's mechanical systems:

*   Mix sauces in the Mixer
*   Fill bottles using Spouts
*   Transport sauces through pipes

### Some Assembly Required

All sauces work as **sandwich spreads**! Spread mustard, mayo, hot sauce, and more on your sandwiches.
